name: context-bazaar
description: Browse curated knowledge artifacts for AI coding assistants from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Browse Kanon knowledge artifacts from Codex
interface.longDescription: Context Bazaar exposes the Kanon catalog to Codex through MCP tools, so Codex can list collections, inspect artifact metadata, and read full knowledge artifacts before installing or adapting them for a target harness.
defaultPrompt: Show me the Context Bazaar collections
Find developer workflow artifacts for Codex
